scripts.build:docs: cd ../../ && pnpm install --frozen-lockfile && pnpm run build:esm && cd packages/docs && cross-env NODE_OPTIONS=--max_old_space_size=32384 pnpm run prep-examples && docusaurus build && node ./scripts/prepare-markdown-files.js && node ./scripts/generate-llms-txt.js && node ./scripts/generate-llms-full-txt.js && node ./scripts/generate-redirects.js
scripts.build:ci: cross-env NODE_OPTIONS=--max_old_space_size=32384 pnpm run prep-examples && docusaurus build && node ./scripts/prepare-markdown-files.js && node ./scripts/generate-llms-txt.js && node ./scripts/generate-llms-full-txt.js && node ./scripts/generate-redirects.js
scripts.dev:docs: pnpm run docs:ci && pnpm run start
scripts.docs:ci-no-tests: cross-env NODE_OPTIONS=--max_old_space_size=16384 && pnpm run prep-no-tests && pnpm run build:docs
scripts.clean: rm -rf node_modules/.cache/storybook && shx rm -rf dist && pnpm run clear
scripts.clean:deep: pnpm run clean && shx rm -rf node_modules
scripts.prep-coverage: cd ../.. && pnpm run test:ci && cd packages/docs && pnpm run copy-coverage-to-docs
scripts.prep-examples: cd ../.. && pnpm run build-all-examples && cd packages/docs && pnpm run copy-examples-to-docs
scripts.prep: pnpm run prep-coverage && pnpm run prep-examples
scripts.prep-no-tests: pnpm run copy-coverage-to-docs && pnpm run prep-examples
scripts.dev: cd ../../ && pnpm run build-all-examples && cd packages/docs && pnpm run docs
